data.title: Trump to Speak at First-Ever Crypto Summit as Market Shows Signs of Recovery
data.description:
.S. president has ever joined a crypto conference. Just recently, Donald Trump hosted the inaugural White House Crypto Summit
source: https://coinpedia.org/uncategorized/trump-to-speak-at-first-ever-crypto-summit-as-market-shows-signs-of-recovery/

data.title: Hyperliquid plans to adjust the fee system after April 30 and introduce a staking tier system
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News Hyperliquid announced that it will adjust the fee system on or after April 30, 2025, and introduce staking tiers. Under the new rules, users who stake HYPE tokens can enjoy lower transaction fees, up to 40% discount. In addition, the spot and contract markets will adopt independent fee systems, and the weight will be doubled when calculating spot trading volume to improve the fairness of fee calculation.
After the adjustment, the default fee rate has increased, the contract taker fee rate has increased from 0.035% to 0.045%, and the spot taker fee rate has doubled from 0.035% to 0.07%. Officials said that this move is aimed at increasing protocol revenue and enhancing the practicality of HYPE.

data.title: Pudgy Penguins CEO: The income from staking ETH through the Fat Penguin NFT is better than directly staking ETH
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Pudgy Penguins CEO Luca Netz posted on X platform that holding Pudgy Penguin NFT is the best way to hold ETH. Since its inception, the return value of Pudgy Penguin NFT has far exceeded staking ETH. Long story short, if you want to maximize the value of your ETH holdings, then use Pudgy Penguin NFT to stake your ETH.

data.title: Gate.io launches USDT, USDC, DYDX, and AVAX on-chain coin earning, with up to 9.48% annualized return
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Gate.io Chain Coin Earning has launched USDT, USDC, DYDX, and AVAX currency mining and simultaneously launched additional rewards, with the highest annualized rate reaching 9.48%. It is reported that through USDC/USDT stablecoin staking, Gate.io Chain Coin Earning supports docking with Compound V3 and Aave V3's DeFi lending protocols, and obtains USDC/USDT/AVAX/COMP and other token income. In addition, users can easily obtain USDC rewards by staking DYDX tokens and entrusting them to validators on the dYdX network.

data.title: ​Bitcoin Surges Amid Eased Financial Conditions, Analyst Predicts All-Time High in Q2
data.description:
Bitcoin has rallied as the Fed eases balance sheet reduction, fueling risk appetite amid shifting global liquidity conditions.
source: https://decrypt.co/310810/bitcoin-financial-conditions-analyst-predicts-all-time-high-in-q2

data.title: Trump Pushes for Lower Interest Rates Amid Economic Slowdown
data.description:
Trump urges Federal Reserve to cut interest rates as US tariffs impact economy. Bitcoin trades at $83,500 amid market reactions.
source: https://coincu.com/327470-trump-interest-rates-economic-slowdown

data.title: Trump warns of possible economic slowdown
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Trump said on social media: "As US tariffs begin to affect the economy (slowdown), it would be much better for the Federal Reserve to lower interest rates. Do the right thing. April 2 is the Liberation Day of the United States." (Jinshi)

data.title: Trump Advocates for Federal Reserve Rate Cut Amid Economic Slowdown
data.description: According to PANews, U.S. President Donald Trump has expressed on social media that the impact of U.S. tariffs is beginning to slow the economy. He suggested that a rate cut by the Federal Reserve would be beneficial, urging the institution to 'do the right thing.' Trump also noted that April 2 is recognized as America's Liberation Day.

data.title: Coinbase releases Ethereum validator performance report, with the number of validators reaching 120,000
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News Coinbase released the first Ethereum validator performance report, disclosing its operations in February 2025.
Data shows that Coinbase currently operates 120,000 Ethereum validators and manages 3.84M ETH (11.42% of the total staked ETH). In addition, 581,500 ETH are staked through partners. As of March 4, Coinbase Ethereum validators had no slashing or double-signing events, and maintained a 99.75% online rate and 99.75% participation rate.
Coinbase uses Lighthouse and Prysm as consensus clients, Geth and Nethermind as execution clients, and supports 6 MEV transaction relays. Its validators are distributed in Japan, Singapore, Ireland, Germany, and Hong Kong, and are hosted on AWS and GCP cloud service providers to improve decentralization and fault recovery capabilities.

data.title: Trojan disguised as a cracked version of TradingView is stealing encrypted user data
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News SlowMist Chief Information Security Officer 23pds warned that AMOS and Lumma information stealers have recently spread through Reddit posts, disguised as cracked versions of TradingView, specifically targeting cryptocurrency users to steal wallets and personal data.
This malware can affect Mac and Windows users, and users are advised to avoid downloading unofficial software to improve account security protection.
